items.claim: Alvin Hines has a record of 7-1 in his career.
items.quote: Alvin Hines, seven-1 in his career

items.claim: Alvin Hines is coming off a suspension for steroid use.
items.quote: He's coming back after that suspension from the steroids about a year ago

items.claim: RJ Harris is undefeated with a 5-0 record.
items.quote: RJ Harris, undefeated in his career at 5-0

items.claim: Alvin Hines has a sloppy striking style characterized by heavy one-twos followed by immediate wrestling.
items.quote: He comes forward, he throws sloppy. He's got some heavy onet twos and then he immediately looks to wrestle off the cage.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is slow but possesses significant strength and grit.
items.quote: He is slow, but he is strong and he is gritty.

items.claim: Alvin Hines demonstrates solid pressure and proficiency in jiu-jitsu once he secures a takedown.
items.quote: If he gets you to the ground, he's got solid pressure and no issues playing that jiu-jitsu game.

items.claim: Alvin Hines has high durability and can maintain his pace for 15 minutes.
items.quote: He is incredibly tough and he can take a beating for a full 15 minutes without slowing down.

items.claim: RJ Harris possesses random knockout power.
items.quote: he does have some random power.

items.claim: RJ Harris has faced a low level of competition in his career.
items.quote: his level of competition has not been the highest.

items.claim: RJ Harris lacks clean striking technique.
items.quote: R.J. does have some clean tech or doesn't have clean technique
